query: SELECT 'threat_group_events' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM threat_group_events WHERE tgeActorId LIKE '%FULCRUM%' OR tgeActorId LIKE '%fulcrum%' UNION ALL SELECT 'ransomware_events', COUNT(*) FROM ransomware_events WHERE reGroupName LIKE '%FULCRUM%' OR reGroupName LIKE '%fulcrum%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT 'threat_group_events' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM threat_group_events WHERE tgeActorId LIKE '%FULCRUM%' OR tgeActorId LIKE '%fulcrum%' UNION ALL SELECT 'ransomware_events', COUNT(*) FROM ransomware_events WHERE reGroupName LIKE '%FULCRUM%' OR reGroupName LIKE '%fulcrum%';
